meta.description: A playful, lifestyle-focused e-commerce store with a youthful, energetic vibe. It features a mix of bold typography, collage-style product imagery, and prominent promotional banners targeting Gen Z and Millennial demographics.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Features an announcement bar at the very top. Header has logo centered, gender toggle on far left, utility icons (search, account, wishlist, cart) on far right, and a secondary navigation bar below.

footer.notes: Bottom section features value propositions (delivery, discount, klarna, materials) in a 4-column layout with a light grey background.

productCard.notes: Screenshot doesn't show standard product grid cards prominently, mostly lifestyle images linked to collections.

productGrid.notes: Icon-based grid for 'Shop by phone model' and logo grid for 'Collabs'.

featuredProducts.label: SHOP PRODUCTS BY YOUR PHONE MODEL
featuredProducts.heading: Not sure what phone model you have?
featuredProducts.notes: Uses simple outline icons representing different phone models in a horizontally scrollable carousel.

sections.name: announcement-bar

content.headline: Promotional offer text regarding buying multiple cases

sections.notes: Sticky or fixed at top of page.

sections.name: hero-collage

design.text: White, large sans-serif lowercase headline centered over images
design.styling: Full bleed, grid-like collage of lifestyle product photos

content.headline: Playful, colloquial phrase about looking good together
content.cta: Single white pill-shaped button with black text, centered at the bottom

media.description: Collage of various phone cases in lifestyle settings (with coffee, glasses, pastries, books)

content.specialElements: Floating 'Get our App' button bottom left, chat bubble bottom right

sections.notes: Highly visual, editorial style hero section.

sections.name: shop-by-model
sections.layout: Centered header, horizontal carousel of icons

design.text: Black text, bold italic uppercase headline

content.headline: Instruction to shop by specific device model
content.body: Help text with a link if user doesn't know their model, followed by brand toggle buttons (Apple, Samsung, Google)
content.cta: Brand toggle buttons, small pill-shaped. Active is dark, inactive is light.

sections.notes: Interactive section to filter products before entering grid.

design.text: White text, massive bold sans-serif for discount, smaller bold for title
design.styling: Full bleed, high impact, no borders

content.headline: Massive discount percentage announcement
content.body: Sale naming convention (e.g., Mid Season Sale)
content.specialElements: Subtext below banner detailing terms and a dark pill-shaped 'Shop All Sale' button.

sections.name: instagram-feed-top

design.styling: No gaps between images, square aspect ratio

media.description: User-generated content style lifestyle images and videos (phone cases, memes, behind the scenes)

sections.notes: Looks like an integrated social media feed.

sections.name: featured-collections

design.text: Black, bold uppercase titles, regular small body text
design.styling: Large lifestyle images with text and CTA centered below each

content.headline: Collection titles
content.body: Short descriptive sentence for each collection
content.cta: Dark pill-shaped button below each description ('Shop The Collection')

media.description: Large editorial lifestyle shots featuring apparel and phone cases

sections.notes: Highlights two distinct aesthetic collections side-by-side.

sections.name: collaborations-logos
sections.layout: Centered text above a grid of logos

design.text: Black, bold uppercase headline, regular body text
design.styling: Logos are monochrome black on white

media.description: Black and white logos of well-known pop culture brands and characters

sections.notes: Builds trust and highlights licensed products.

sections.name: shop-categories
sections.layout: 3 columns: image left, text list center, image right

design.text: Black, bold uppercase italic for list items
design.styling: Tall lifestyle images framing a central list of clickable categories

content.headline: SHOP WITH US
content.body: Vertical list of main product categories (Phone Cases, Clothing, etc.)
content.cta: White pill-shaped button with thin outline 'Show me everything'

media.description: Two portrait orientation lifestyle photos of a model wearing brand clothing and holding phone cases

design.styling: Border top and bottom, clean minimalist form

content.headline: STAY IN THE LOOP
content.body: Call to action to sign up for daily deals and offers
content.cta: Dark pill-shaped 'Sign up' button attached to an email input field with pill-shaped outline
content.specialElements: Inline form with rounded input and button

content.cta: Dark pill-shaped 'Show more' button centered below grid

media.description: Continuation of user-generated content / social media feed images

design.text: Black, small text. Bold titles, regular descriptions.

items.title: Payment options
